gemini.comment: Gemini-primary, Claude cross-backend backup. Each role keeps the verified gemini-2.5-flash primary; on quota/404/auth it fails over to the benchmark's per-role Claude winner (only opus reliably dispatches as supervisor). Claude backups need only the subscription; no extra setup.

claude.comment: Claude-primary (benchmark per-role mix: only opus dispatches as supervisor; haiku for bulk summarize/compress), gemini-2.5-flash cross-backend backup if Claude throttles. The flash backup needs the gemini CLI logged in (see .env.example); without it the backup call just fails too -- no worse than no backup.

codex.comment: ChatGPT/Codex CLI primary with gemini then claude backups. NB codex exec is agentic (runs repo commands); keep its backend sandbox read-only before using in anger (see .env.example). Two backups because codex is the least proven backend here.
